properties.property: {"id":6,"name":"Day Care Man","x":26,"y":11,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 18","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"DayCare.egg_generated?"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bAh, it\u0027s you!"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bWe were raising your Pok\u00E9mon, and my goodness, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["were we surprised!"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYour Pok\u00E9mon was holding an Egg!"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bWe don\u0027t know how it got there, but your Pok\u00E9mon "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["had it."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYou do want it, don\u0027t you?"]},{"c":102,"i":1,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":118,"i":2,"p":["ReceiveEgg"]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[12,"$player.party_full?"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bYou have no room for it right now... Come back "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["when you\u0027ve made room."]},{"c":115,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\me[Egg get]\\PN received the Egg from the Day-Care "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["Man."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bYou take good care of it."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["DayCare.collect_egg"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bI really will keep it. You do want this Egg, yes?"]},{"c":102,"i":2,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":2,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":119,"i":3,"p":["ReceiveEgg"]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":2,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bWell all right then, I\u0027ll take it. Thank you."]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bThat is, I don\u0027t think we\u0027ll ever find another..."]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bNo, no, I\u0027m sure we\u0027ll find another one. I\u0027m definitely "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["sure of it!"]},{"c":355,"i":3,"p":["DayCare.reset_egg_counters"]},{"c":115,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"DayCare.count == 0"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bI\u0027m the Day-Care Man."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bI help take care of the precious Pok\u00E9mon of "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["trainers."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bAny Pok\u00E9mon you\u0027d like to have raised you can "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["leave in my wife\u0027s care."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"DayCare.count == -1)"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["DayCare.get_compatibility(5)"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bAh, it\u0027s you!\\nGood to see you!"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bYour \\v[3] and \\v[4] are doing just fine."]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[1,5,0,0,0]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bThe two play with other Pok\u00E9mon rather than with "]},{"c":401,"i":3,"p":["each {"id":7,"name":"Vendor","x":12,"y":21,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 19","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Pok\u00E9 Balls are cheaper on Saturdays (day 6)."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["If the first value (the 0) is greater than 0, then the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["name of today (\u0022Saturday\u0022) is stored in the Game "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Variable of that number."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"pbIsWeekday(0, 6)"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bWe\u0027re having a sale today. 25% off all Pok\u00E9 Balls."]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["setPrice(item, buy price, sell price)"]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["If the sell price isn\u0027t given, it will be half of the buy "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["price. If the sell price is 0, the player cannot sell it to "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["the Mart."]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["You can use this to change the sell price of items sold "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["by the player to the Mart, even if the Mart doesn\u0027t "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["stock them."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Price changes only apply to the next call to "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["pbPokemonMart. After that, they are forgotten."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["setPrice(:GREATBALL, 450)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["setPrice(:ULTRABALL, 600)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["setPrice(:TIMERBALL, 750)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["setPrice(:REPEATBALL, 750)"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This vendor is selling a Key Item, the Silph Scope. If "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["the player has a Silph Scope already, it will not "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["appear in the vendor\u0027s inventory."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Key Items sold by vendors/Marts should have a non-"]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["zero price."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["setPrice(:SILPHSCOPE, 5000)"]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[0,12,0]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbPokemonMart(["]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :SILPHSCOPE,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :GREATBALL, :ULTRABALL,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :LEMONADE, :SODAPOP, :FRESHWATER,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :MOOMOOMILK,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :TIMERBALL, :REPEATBALL,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :LAVACOOKIE"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["])"]},{"c":115,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbPokemonMart(["]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" :SILPHSCOPE,"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" :GREATBALL, :ULTRABALL,"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" :SODAPOP, :FRESHWATER"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["])"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":9,"name":"Bicycle NPC","x":13,"y":27,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 19","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This NPC swaps a Lemonade for a Bicycle (because "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Essentials doesn\u0027t come with a Bike Voucher item)."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bHi! I\u0027m super thirsty. Do you have a Lemonade? I\u0027ll "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["trade you a Bicycle for one. I have too many "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["Bicycles."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"$bag.has?(:LEMONADE)"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bOh, you have a Lemonade? Would you consider "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["exchanging it for a Bicycle?"]},{"c":102,"i":1,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bExcellent! Here you go."]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[12,"pbReceiveItem(:BICYCLE)"]},{"c":108,"i":3,"p":["There is no need to check whether it\u0027s possible to "]},{"c":408,"i":3,"p":["delete a Lemonade from the player\u0027s Bag, because "]},{"c":408,"i":3,"p":["the check above made sure there is at least one of "]},{"c":408,"i":3,"p":["them in the Bag, so it can definitely be deleted."]},{"c":355,"i":3,"p":["$bag.remove(:LEMONADE)"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bThank you! I really needed this."]},{"c":123,"i":3,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bYou have no space in your Bag.
